exploration_notes: Found 4 files under pkg/components/loki/ matching the criteria. For HTTP client timeout/retry/backoff: lokihttp/client.go defines StopNow() (line 376), backoff retry loop (line 299-318), and sets client.Timeout (line 175); lokihttp/config.go defines BackoffConfig and Timeout fields (lines 19-20). For gRPC client retry: lokigrpc/client.go calls grpcretry.WithMax (line 85) and uses cfg.Timeout (lines 91-92); lokigrpc/config.go defines the Timeout field (line 10).
